channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [JUSTDIAL] Just Dial Authorizes KMPs for Materiality & Disclosure
item.description:
Just Dial Ltd has authorized Mr. V.S.S. Mani, Managing Director and CEO, and Mr. Manan Udani, Company Secretary & Compliance Officer, as Key Managerial Personnel (KMP) under Regulation 30(5) of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015. These KMPs are empowered to determine the materiality of any event or information and to make the necessary disclosures to the stock exchange(s). Their contact details, including email IDs, have been provided for this purpose. The company has also stated that this information is available on its official website.

  • Just Dial authorized KMPs under Regulation 30(5) of Listing Regulations.
  • Mr. V.S.S. Mani (MD & CEO) is an authorized KMP.
  • Mr. Manan Udani (CS & Compliance Officer) is also authorized.
  • KMPs will determine materiality and make stock exchange disclosures.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JUST DIAL LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [BALLARPUR] Ballarpur Industries to hold 80th AGM on May 11, 2026
item.description:
Ballarpur Industries Ltd has announced its 80th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on Monday, May 11, 2026, at 2:00 P.M. (IST). The meeting will take place via video conferencing, with its registered office in Mumbai as the deemed venue. The Annual Report and the Notice of the 80th AGM for the financial year 2024-25 have been forwarded to members and are also accessible on the company's website. The filing also provides comprehensive corporate information, including details of the Board of Directors, Key Managerial Personnel, and various auditors.

  • Ballarpur Industries' 80th AGM is scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • The AGM will be conducted virtually via video conferencing mode.
  • Annual Report and AGM Notice for FY24-25 are now available.
  • The filing includes updated Board of Directors and KMP details.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALLARPUR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [BALLARPUR] Ballarpur Industries: 80th AGM scheduled for May 11, 2026
item.description:
Ballarpur Industries Ltd has announced its 80th Annual General Meeting (AGM), scheduled for Monday, May 11, 2026, at 2:00 P.M. (IST). The meeting will be conducted via video conferencing. The company has forwarded the Annual Report and the Notice of the 80th AGM, which form part of the Integrated Annual Report for the financial year 2024-25. These documents are also accessible on the company's official website. The filing also provides comprehensive corporate information, including the current Board of Directors, Key Managerial Personnel, various auditors, and details of the registered office.

  • Ballarpur Industries' 80th AGM is scheduled for May 11, 2026.
  • The AGM will be held virtually via video conferencing mode.
  • Annual Report and AGM Notice for FY2024-25 are now available.
  • Corporate information, including board and KMP details, is provided.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALLARPUR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [LATENTVIEW] Latent View Analytics assigned ESG Rating of 76 by ESG Risk Assessments
item.description:
Latent View Analytics Ltd. announced that it has been assigned an ESG Rating of "76" by M/s. ESG Risk Assessments and Insights Limited. The company clarified that it had not engaged M/s. ESG Risk Assessments and Insights Limited for this rating. The report was independently prepared by the said entity, utilizing data pertaining to Latent View Analytics available in the public domain. This disclosure is made in accordance with Regulation 30 of SEBI Listing Regulations.

  • Latent View Analytics received an ESG Rating of 76.
  • The rating was assigned by ESG Risk Assessments and Insights.
  • Company did not engage the agency for this independent rating.
  • Report based on publicly available data about the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Latent View Analytics Ltd | Category: ESG

item.title: [MAHABANK] Bank of Maharashtra Board to Meet Apr 20 for Q4/FY26 Results, Dividend, Capital Raise
item.description:
Bank of Maharashtra has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on April 20, 2026. The agenda includes considering and approving the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board will also discuss a proposal for recommending a final dividend for FY 2025-26 and a proposal for bond/capital raising. The trading window for designated persons and their immediate relatives closed on April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 20, 2026.
  • To approve Q4 and FY26 audited financial results.
  • Consider final dividend recommendation for FY2025-26.
  • Discuss proposal for bond/capital raising.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF MAHARASHTRA | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [THINKINK] Thinkink Picturez EGM to approve FCCB fundraising
item.description:
Thinkink Picturez Ltd. announced an Extra Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) to be held on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 12:00 P.M. at its corporate office in Ahmedabad. The primary agenda for the EGM is to seek shareholder approval, via a Special Resolution, for raising funds through the issuance of Foreign Currency Convertible Bonds (FCCBs). The company has set May 1, 2026, as the cut-off date for determining e-voting rights. This fundraising initiative will be conducted in accordance with various provisions of the Companies Act, 2013, SEBI regulations, FEMA, and other applicable guidelines.

  • EGM scheduled for May 8, 2026, to approve fundraising.
  • Company seeks approval to issue Foreign Currency Convertible Bonds (FCCBs).
  • Fundraising will be via a Special Resolution at the EGM.
  • Cut-off date for e-voting rights is May 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Thinkink Picturez Ltd | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [BALLARPUR] Ballarpur Industries to hold 79th AGM on May 11, 2026
item.description:
Ballarpur Industries Ltd has announced that its 79th Annual General Meeting (AGM) will be held on Monday, May 11, 2026, at 1:00 P.M. (IST). The meeting will be conducted via video conferencing, with the registered office in Mumbai deemed as the venue. The company has forwarded the Annual Report and the Notice for the 79th AGM, which forms part of the Integrated Annual Report for the financial year 2023-24. The Notice is also available on the company's website.

  • Ballarpur Industries to hold its 79th AGM.
  • AGM scheduled for May 11, 2026, at 1:00 P.M. IST.
  • Meeting will be conducted via video conferencing.
  • Annual Report and AGM Notice for FY23-24 released.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BALLARPUR INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [ADVMULT] Advance Multitech Board to meet on Apr 27 to consider fundraising
item.description:
Advance Multitech Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will convene on April 27, 2026, to discuss and approve proposals for raising funds. This meeting is an adjournment of the previously scheduled board meeting on April 15, 2026, which could not be held. Additionally, the trading window for dealing in the company's securities remains closed for all insiders, including promoters, directors, and their relatives, from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 27, 2026, to consider fundraising.
  • The meeting was adjourned from its original date of April 15, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until Q4 FY26 results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Advance Multitech Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GTPL] GTPL Hathway Board approves Q4/FY26 results, ₹2 dividend, re-appoints director
item.description:
GTPL Hathway's Board of Directors approved the Audited Financial Results (Standalone and Consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The statutory auditors, Deloitte Haskins & Sells, issued an unmodified opinion on these results. Additionally, the Board recommended a dividend of ₹2.00 per equity share for the financial year ended March 31, 2026, pending approval from members at the upcoming Annual General Meeting. The Board also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Rajendra Dwarkadas Hingwala as an Independent Director for a second three-year term, effective July 13, 2026, also subject to member approval.

  • Board approved Q4 and FY26 Audited Financial Results.
  • Auditors issued unmodified opinion on financial results.
  • Recommended ₹2.00 per share dividend for FY26.
  • Re-appointed Mr. Rajendra Hingwala as Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GTPL Hathway Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SPANDANA] Spandana Sphoorty Board to Consider NCD Issue on April 20, 2026
item.description:
Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd has scheduled a Management Committee meeting of its Board of Directors for April 20, 2026. The key agenda for this meeting is to consider and approve the issuance and offer of Non-Convertible Debentures (NCDs) through a private placement. This move suggests the company is exploring options to raise capital, likely to support its operational growth or refinance existing debt, leveraging the private placement route for efficiency.

  • Board meeting scheduled for April 20, 2026.
  • Management Committee to meet for NCD consideration.
  • Company plans to issue NCDs via private placement.
  • This indicates potential fund-raising activity.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Spandana Sphoorty Financial Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
